content: Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative improvement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid self-improvement system that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no extra training or supervision while resolving its blind spot of missing diverse critical feedback. This hybrid system lets an LLM first refine an initial output through iterative self-feedback, then pull in conflicting alternative solutions from its own inconsistent solving perspectives to catch flaws that a single self-feedback loop would miss.
